hero.headline: Streamline Remote Team Productivity with AI
hero.subheadline: FlowSync transforms how distributed teams collaborate, plan, and execute with intelligent project management.

features.title: AI-Powered Task Prioritization
features.description: Our intelligent algorithm analyzes team workload and automatically suggests optimal task priorities and resource allocation.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration Insights
features.description: Instant visibility into team progress, bottlenecks, and performance metrics with intuitive, interactive dashboards.

features.title: Seamless Cross-Platform Sync
features.description: Unified workspace that integrates with your favorite tools: Slack, GitHub, Zoom, and more—keeping everyone connected.

testimonials.quote: FlowSync has been a game-changer for our distributed engineering team. The AI recommendations are incredibly accurate.

testimonials.title: CTO, TechInnovate

testimonials.quote: We've seen a 40% increase in team productivity since implementing FlowSync. It's like having a project management coach.

testimonials.title: Head of Product, DataStream

pricing.headline: Flexible Plans for Teams of All Sizes

hero_image_prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard showing AI-powered project management interface. Diverse remote team collaborating across digital devices. Clean, professional tech environment with blue and purple color accents. Holographic UI elements showing task prioritization and team insights.
